fields.title: Update agent delegation skill documentation
fields.description:
Update the task-delegation skill to reflect new agent API.

## Deliverables
- Update skills/task-delegation/SKILL.md → skills/agent/SKILL.md (or rename)

## Content Updates
- New API: single agent tool with actions
- Non-blocking semantics explanation
- spawn/send/wait/close/list examples
- Inter-agent communication patterns
- Remove batch task array syntax
- Update coordination patterns for non-blocking

## Example Patterns

**Fan-out with explicit wait:**
```typescript
// Spawn workers
agent({ action: 'spawn', type: 'search', message: 'Find auth files' })  // → id1
agent({ action: 'spawn', type: 'search', message: 'Find API routes' })  // → id2
// Do other work...
// Wait for results
agent({ action: 'wait', ids: [id1, id2] })
```

**Interactive refinement:**
```typescript
agent({ action: 'spawn', type: 'code', message: 'Draft the function' })  // → id
agent({ action: 'wait', ids: [id] })  // Wait for draft
agent({ action: 'send', id, message: 'Add error handling' })  // Refine
agent({ action: 'wait', ids: [id] })  // Wait for update
agent({ action: 'close', id })  // Cleanup
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All examples use new agent API
- [ ] Non-blocking semantics clearly explained
- [ ] spawn/send/wait/close/list all documented
- [ ] Inter-agent communication documented
- [ ] Old batch syntax removed
- [ ] Skill name updated if renamed
fields.close_reason: Implemented and migrated non-blocking agent system
